text: "Hello?" "Hi." "Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through main state relief program. So, have you been notified about these benefits yet?" "Listen, this is a municipal wastewater treatment plan. We treat people's storage here. I don't know who you think you're calling, but I'm not an individual, I'm a business utility company."
